zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Thornton, Jr.於1374年出生在英國越可爾牛頓時，他的父親Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany33歲，母親Margery Thweng24歲。他與Isabel Gray結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1418年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Thornton, Jr.于1374年出生在英国越可爾牛頓时，他的父亲Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany33岁，母亲Margery Thweng24岁。他与Isabel Gray结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1418年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thornton,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England and Scotland so called, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The placename is most frequent in northern England, especially Yorkshire, where there are at least 16 possible sources for the surname.
Irish: Anglicized (translated) form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin ‘son of Sceachán’ (see Skehan ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Draighneáin ‘descendant of Draighneán’ (see Drennan ).

variants.name: Thornber
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the five minor places in Yorkshire called Thornber, particularly Thornber in Halton West. The placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn’ + beorg ‘hill, mound’.
Irish: adopted for various Irish names containing an element meaning ‘thorn’; compare   Thornton  .

variants.name: Thorton
meanings: English: probably a shortened form of   Thornton  , or a habitational name from Thorton in Marnhull, Dorset, which has the same origin.

variants.name: Skehan
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Sceacháin or Ó Sceacháin ‘son (or descendant) of Sceachán’, a personal name probably based on a diminutive of sceach ‘briar, thorn bush’. The Gaelic name has sometimes been ‘translated’ as Thornton .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Thornton, Jr. was born in 1374, in Newton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany, was 33 and his mother, Margery Thweng, was 24. He married Isabel Gray. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1418, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Thornton, Jr. est né en 1374, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margery Thweng, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Gray. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1418, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Thornton, Jr. 1374 in Newton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany 33 und seine Mutter Margery Thweng 24. Er hat Isabel Gray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1418 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Thornton, Jr. è nato il nel 1374 nel Newton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Margery Thweng, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Gray. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1418, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Thornton, Jr.が1374年にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albanyは33歳，母Margery Thwengは24歳であった。Isabel Grayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1418年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Thornton, Jr.(이)가 1374년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Thweng(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Isabel Gray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Thornton, Jr. nasceu em 1374, em Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margery Thweng, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Gray. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1418, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Thornton, Jr. родился в 1374 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margery Thweng, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Gray. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1418 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Thornton, Jr. nació en 1374, en Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Thornton, Duke of Albany, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margery Thweng, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Isabel Gray. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1418, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años.
